message:
test(runtime): add 16 tests for resize watchdog types and runtime metrics edge cases

Cover ResizeWatchdogSeverity serde, warning_line() for all severity
variants, RuntimeMetrics single/multi sample edge cases, lock contention
counting, and RuntimeLockMemoryTelemetrySnapshot round-trip. Expands
module from 27 to 43 tests.

Contributes to wa-1u90p.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
